default_binding.OPENING_MOMENT: the last bus gone as fog closes in
default_binding.LIGHT_MOTIF: a pale light in the dark lamp room
default_binding.LAMP_RIG: a lantern and a rig of angled mirrors
default_binding.ROUTE_B_PLACE: the tower stair to the lamp
default_binding.ROUTE_C_PLACE: the sea caves under the rock
default_binding.A_CORRIDOR: the hall to the tower's inner door
default_binding.A_DESK_KEY: a brass key wrapped in oilcloth
default_binding.B_DOWNSTAIR: the stair down into the tower's core
default_binding.C_ROCKSTEPS: the slick steps cut into the rock
default_binding.CM_COTTAGE: a shepherd's cottage on the inland moor
default_binding.CM_PLEA: a plea to make it right

slots.meaning: The clue recovered from the hearth's ash.
slots.guidance: A salvaged image or document; safe, no burns implied.

slots.meaning: One of two searchable shelf items.
slots.guidance: A curio hiding a clue; harmless to open.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the fallen brick.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after a forced brick collapses.

slots.meaning: The loose hearth brick offering a careful-open-vs-force choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: Forcing it only causes dust and rubble; never a source of injury.

slots.meaning: The hallway route A's clues all lead toward.
slots.guidance: A safe, passable hall connecting the cottage to the tower.

slots.meaning: The furniture searched first in the cottage office.
slots.guidance: A container of clues (desk/bureau); nothing hazardous inside.

slots.meaning: The stuck drawer offering a careful-open-vs-force choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: Forcing it only damages furniture and ends the route for the night; never a source of injury.

slots.meaning: The key recovered from the desk drawer.
slots.guidance: A small metal keepsake; opens a door later.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the split drawer.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after a forced drawer breaks.

slots.meaning: The third searchable furniture in the office.
slots.guidance: A cold, safe fireplace or equivalent; ash, not embers.

slots.meaning: The key recovered from behind the hearth brick.
slots.guidance: A small metal keepsake; opens a door later.

slots.meaning: The alternate side-passage off the corridor.
slots.guidance: A dim but safe room; a shortcut, not a hazard.

slots.meaning: The other searchable shelf item.
slots.guidance: A record book hiding a clue; harmless to open.

slots.meaning: The document found in the desk.
slots.guidance: A short written clue; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The second searchable furniture in the office.
slots.guidance: A container of clues (shelving/books); nothing hazardous inside.

slots.meaning: The clockwork mechanism in the lamp room.
slots.guidance: A dormant mechanical device; safe to examine or wind.

slots.meaning: The descent route inside the tower's core.
slots.guidance: A safe stairway or shaft leading further down.

slots.meaning: The outdoor walkway around the lamp room.
slots.guidance: An exterior walk with a railing; safe if the rail is trusted carefully.

slots.meaning: The alternate quick way down from the lamp room.
slots.guidance: A safe service opening; a shortcut down.

slots.meaning: The great optical apparatus in the lamp room.
slots.guidance: A large, inert optical fixture; not lit by any real flame.

slots.meaning: The flaw in the lens revealing the truth.
slots.guidance: A visual clue; safe to look through.

slots.meaning: The hidden fitting behind the lens.
slots.guidance: A concealed mechanism; safe to examine.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the rotten rail.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the rail proves untrustworthy.

slots.meaning: The rusted gallery rail offering a trust-it-or-retreat choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A shaky rail that can always be safely abandoned by stepping back inside; never gives way with the hero on it.

slots.meaning: The main stairway down from the lamp room.
slots.guidance: A safe, winding stairway.

slots.meaning: One of two authorities to alert.
slots.guidance: A helpful rescue authority.

slots.meaning: The valuable object found in the hidden hoard.
slots.guidance: A beautiful, tempting keepsake; the moral choice is whether to take it.

slots.meaning: The second thing at the end of the letter.
slots.guidance: A written confession; safe to read and share.

slots.meaning: The destination the map points to.
slots.guidance: A safe, remote dwelling.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the jammed gears.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unsolved-but-unharmed outcome after the gears jam.

slots.meaning: The stiff lamp gears offering an align-gently-or-force choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: Old gears that jam if forced, never causing injury.

slots.meaning: The other authority to alert.
slots.guidance: A helpful local official.

slots.meaning: The alternate destination for the map.
slots.guidance: A safe, staffed office in town.

slots.meaning: The central document found in the sealed room.
slots.guidance: A sealed letter explaining the whole mystery; safe to read or carry.

slots.meaning: One of three things at the end of the letter.
slots.guidance: A hand-drawn map; safe to follow.

slots.meaning: The optical part realigned to relight the lamp.
slots.guidance: A safe mechanical part to adjust.

slots.meaning: The third thing at the end of the letter.
slots.guidance: A heartfelt written request; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The final sealed room every route converges on.
slots.guidance: A snug, dry, safe room under the sea.

slots.meaning: The signalling device studied as an alternative.
slots.guidance: A safe, clever signalling mechanism.

slots.meaning: One of the sealed room's three follow-up threads.
slots.guidance: The smugglers' hidden store; safe to investigate.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: pocketing the compass triggers an alarm.
slots.guidance: Names a consequence (being caught, questions asked) that is awkward, never harmful.

slots.meaning: The carved cave archway.
slots.guidance: A stone archway with old markings; safe to study.

slots.meaning: The metal object found in the pools.
slots.guidance: A small lost keepsake; safe to retrieve.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the narrow gap.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat from the tight squeeze.

slots.meaning: The narrow squeeze offering a push-on-or-back-out choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A tight but passable gap; backing out is always available and safe.

slots.meaning: The other way up from the cave gathering point.
slots.guidance: An old but sound ladder.

slots.meaning: The tally marks carved at the arch.
slots.guidance: A readable clue carved in stone.

slots.meaning: The inland cave passage.
slots.guidance: A safe but narrowing tidal passage.

slots.meaning: The glimmering cave tide pools.
slots.guidance: A shallow, safe pool area, no deep water.

slots.meaning: The rock-cut steps beyond the passage.
slots.guidance: Slick but climbable steps.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the rising tide.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat from the rising water.

slots.meaning: The rising tide offering a push-on-or-retreat choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: The tide rises slowly enough that retreat is always possible; never traps or submerges the hero.

slots.meaning: The glowing weed found in the pools.
slots.guidance: A harmless bioluminescent plant.

slots.meaning: One of two ways up from the cave gathering point.
slots.guidance: Worn but safe steps.

slots.meaning: The map found under the dinghy's cover.
slots.guidance: A useful navigational document.

slots.meaning: The small boat searched in the boathouse.
slots.guidance: A safe, beached vessel with hidden compartments.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the slamming door.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat when the storm interrupts.

slots.meaning: The wind-loosened boathouse door disrupting the hatch choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A banging door that startles but never harms; always safe to step back from.

slots.meaning: The floor opening leading toward the tower.
slots.guidance: A safe, if stiff, floor hatch.

slots.meaning: The other useful tool in the locker.
slots.guidance: A workable light source.

slots.meaning: The tool storage searched in the boathouse.
slots.guidance: A safe storage container with useful gear.

slots.meaning: The elevated storage searched in the boathouse.
slots.guidance: A safe upper storage area, reached by a rickety ladder.

slots.meaning: One of two useful tools in the locker.
slots.guidance: A coil of usable rope.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the broken rung.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the rung gives way.

slots.meaning: The cracked loft rung offering a careful-climb-or-trust-it choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A weak rung that gives a short, harmless fall if trusted; never causes real injury.

slots.meaning: The container found in the dinghy's bow.
slots.guidance: A small container holding a clue.

slots.meaning: Neutral ending: a trail is left for others to follow.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: the harbour authority acts on the evidence.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The child protagonist.
slots.guidance: A single kid-relatable explorer (name or role); capable but not reckless.

slots.meaning: Ending: the hidden hoard is documented for the law.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Neutral ending: the hero leaves a temptation behind.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The recurring clue-document every route eventually leads to.
slots.guidance: A found record (diary, log, journal) that carries the mystery's threads; safe to read and carry.

slots.meaning: One of two smuggling-thread sub-clues.
slots.guidance: A ledger's numeric entries; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The journal's thread about smuggling.
slots.guidance: A written clue thread; safe to read.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the cellar door.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat from the dark cellar.

slots.meaning: The locked cellar door tempting a detour off the smuggling thread. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A door that only opens onto darkness; stepping back is always safe.

slots.meaning: The other smuggling-thread sub-clue.
slots.guidance: A coded list of names; safe to puzzle out.

slots.meaning: The marked floor stone in the tunnel thread.
slots.guidance: A heavy but movable floor stone.

slots.meaning: The convergence stair all three journal threads point toward.
slots.guidance: A concealed but safe stairway.

slots.meaning: The other light-thread sub-clue.
slots.guidance: A list of dates; safe to read.

slots.meaning: One of two light-thread sub-clues.
slots.guidance: A written description; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The journal's thread about the light.
slots.guidance: A written clue thread; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The missing ledger page, later found.
slots.guidance: A recovered document fragment; safe to read.

slots.meaning: The journal's thread about the tunnel.
slots.guidance: A drawn clue thread; safe to study.

slots.meaning: The vanished figure whose disappearance is the mystery's origin.
slots.guidance: A backstory adult, never physically present as a threat; benign, sympathetic, missing rather than menacing.

slots.meaning: Ending: the vanished keeper found alive (fullest completion).
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: word reaches help and the keeper is rescued.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The mechanism behind the mystery light, discovered and later reused for good.
slots.guidance: A clever, benign device (rig, mechanism, apparatus); never a weapon or hazard.

slots.meaning: Neutral ending: the letter is carried out unread.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The recurring mystery signal that draws the hero on.
slots.guidance: An ambient, wondrous cue (a light, a sound, a glow); ultimately revealed as made, not supernatural or hazardous.

slots.meaning: Ending: the true lamp is relit for good.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The other item in the landing cupboard.
slots.guidance: A worn coat holding a clue in its pocket.

slots.meaning: The storage cupboard on the stone-stair landing.
slots.guidance: A safe storage cupboard with keeper's keepsakes.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: too thick a fog.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat from the thickening fog.

slots.meaning: The thickening fog on the outer ladder offering a push-on-or-wait choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: Fog that only obscures visibility; retreat up the ladder is always available.

slots.meaning: The third descent from the light chamber.
slots.guidance: An exterior ladder, safe if fog is respected.

slots.meaning: One of two items in the landing cupboard.
slots.guidance: A spare optical part; safe to carry.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the frayed rope.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the rope frays.

slots.meaning: The knotted rope offering a trust-it-or-use-staples choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A fraying rope; failure only means climbing back to the staples, never a fall.

slots.meaning: The second descent from the light chamber.
slots.guidance: A vertical service shaft with a safe climbing aid.

slots.meaning: One of three descents from the light chamber.
slots.guidance: A broad, safe stone stairway.

slots.meaning: The fixed climbing aid in the service shaft.
slots.guidance: Sturdy iron rungs set in the shaft wall.

slots.meaning: The tunnel entrance all three descents converge on.
slots.guidance: A safe, dry passage entrance.

slots.meaning: Neutral ending: the journal is handed to the town.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: the keeper's name is publicly cleared.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The circumstance that strands the hero here at nightfall.
slots.guidance: An ordinary mishap (missed transport, bad weather) that is inconvenient, never dangerous.

slots.meaning: Ending: the hero vows to honor the keeper's plea.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: the signal rig calls in outside help.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The named place explored down route A.
slots.guidance: A distinct, self-contained area of the threshold; safe to enter; distinguishable from the other three routes.

slots.meaning: The named place explored down route B.
slots.guidance: A distinct, self-contained area of the threshold; safe to enter; distinguishable from the other three routes.

slots.meaning: The named place explored down route C.
slots.guidance: A distinct, self-contained area of the threshold; safe to enter; distinguishable from the other three routes.

slots.meaning: The named place explored down route D.
slots.guidance: A distinct, self-contained area of the threshold; safe to enter; distinguishable from the other three routes.

slots.meaning: Ending: the signal mechanism is fully understood.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: Ending: the smugglers are caught in the act.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.

slots.meaning: The door both stair options converge on.
slots.guidance: A safe door glowing with the mystery light beyond.

slots.meaning: The exterior stair option at the second bottleneck.
slots.guidance: An exposed but sound exterior stairway.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the hollow step.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the step gives way.

slots.meaning: The hollow-sounding step offering a trust-it-or-careful-climb choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A step that gives underfoot but never causes real harm; recovery is always safe.

slots.meaning: The interior stair option at the second bottleneck.
slots.guidance: A dark but sound interior stairway.

slots.meaning: The whole bounded, explorable place the story happens inside.
slots.guidance: One landmark with several ways in; self-contained; wonder over dread; no lethal hazards, no toxic/unbreathable air.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: under the beam.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the beam shifts.

slots.meaning: The fallen beam blocking the keeper's-door branch. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A heavy but liftable beam; a near miss at worst, never an injury.

slots.meaning: One of two searchable containers in the store.
slots.guidance: A crate hiding contraband; safe to open.

slots.meaning: The water movement at the sea gate.
slots.guidance: A strong but survivable current; never sweeps the hero away.

slots.meaning: One of three tunnel branches: the sealed room door.
slots.guidance: A sealed, safe door blocking the keeper's private room.

slots.meaning: The key used at the keeper's door.
slots.guidance: A brass key; a tool, not a weapon.

slots.meaning: The light source carried through the store passage.
slots.guidance: A carried lantern running low on fuel; no fire hazard implied.

slots.meaning: The other searchable container in the store.
slots.guidance: A locked record box; safe to open.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the flooded gate.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat from the rising water at the gate.

slots.meaning: The barred sea gate offering an open-it-or-retreat choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: A tidal gate that floods slowly; retreat to the dry passage is always available.

slots.meaning: The second tunnel branch: the smugglers' store.
slots.guidance: A safe storage chamber full of contraband.

slots.meaning: Setback ending title: the broken ward.
slots.guidance: Names a safe, unharmed retreat after the lock jams for good.

slots.meaning: The stuck lock wards offering a coax-or-force choice. (commit-or-turn-back obstacle; must read as safely retreatable)
slots.guidance: Old mechanical wards; forcing them only jams the lock, never harms the hero.

slots.meaning: Neutral ending: the hero heads home, mystery unresolved.
slots.guidance: Positive or neutral discovery; a real resolution, never a hazard.
